programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet convinces Mrs. Roper to join her in a nude beach protest.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper thinks the candid diary Chrissy is transcribing is her own.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy compete in a test of willpower.

programme.desc: RuPaul introduces a twist that leaves the dolls gagging.

programme.desc: The queens go to Gay Paree, in the romantic musical, Moulin Ru; singer Andra Day judges; actor Leslie Jordan stars.

programme.desc: The best celebrity impressions for a dating show version of the Snatch Game, with guest judges Tommy Dorfman and Jeffery Bowyer Chapman.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The group take on celebrity impressions to try and impress some eligible bachelors; the game of snatch is revamped to include a twist, as the queens fight to remain in the competition.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: In a salute to all things Jersey, the All Stars plead their cases before "Judge" Michelle Visage in an unscripted courtroom parody; extra special guest judges Zoë Kravitz and comic Erica Ash join.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars compete in a comedy roast and must write and perform a "Rulogy" for a drag legend, Lady Bunny; special guest judges Cecily Strong and Yvette Nicole Brown join the fun.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: For the first time, all the eliminated All Stars get a chance to return to the competition, but they must send home a competing All Star in a shocking midseason lip sync smackdown.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
